text: In today's video, I will tell you how to do multi-threading in Python Programming Using the multi-threading module Let's go to the computer screen and see the multi-threading of Python So guys, before telling you about multi-threading I want to tell you what you can achieve from multi-threading and why you will use multi-threading The first use case of multi-threading is when you want to download resources parallelly from the internet Suppose I have 10 servers and I want different data from those 10 servers If I download data one by one Suppose I want to download 10 files from the internet 10 files of 10 GB I have fast internet and fast computer But if I install them one by one in my Python Program Then it will be downloaded one by one And if it will be downloaded one by one, then I am wasting time Because I can do it parallelly We will see how to do it parallelly Because I have resources, my computer is fast I have internet speed I am not losing anywhere The third thing is that I have to use this And I have to use the multi-threading module So let's open the Apple and show you how these things are done And I will show you directly how to do it When I will tell you how to do it directly, you will get a good feeling You will also say that now I have understood how to do it So first of all, I will tell you that by doing multi-threading Sorry, by threading, the module is done in Python We have done import threading Now suppose I have a function And it is doing something Now I will import time I will make a function and what it will do is All the seconds I have written here It will sleep for those seconds This is a function which indicates some task being done Means if you do any work in Python programming, it will take time This indicates that something is happening Understand what I mean So I wrote def func and did this But suppose I have written func1 I have written func2 But suppose I run func4 And I will do one thing I will print here Sleeping for And I will write here Seconds Seconds Means if you are sleeping for 4 seconds Then sleeping for 4 seconds will be written Or sleeping for 1 second will be written And so on So now if I run it I will run it and show you Suppose I want to make one more function Func4 Func2 Suppose this is a function and it is doing some work And whatever work it is doing It will take time So func4 Func2 and func1 will be executed one by one So if I run it and show you So Now see sleeping for 4 seconds It will stop for 4 seconds Means till 4 seconds are over, it will not work 2 seconds are over, it is 5, 3 or 15 Now if suppose 3 parallel people are working So there is no point of this That the second person stops And waits for the first person to finish Means suppose one person is making okra He is stopping that I will make roti When okra will be made Then he is making roti Means I will make paneer butter masala when he will make roti So there is no point of that So we want to start all
